description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named release that triggers on push of tags matching v[0-9]* or workflow dispatch. Run a single ubuntu-20.04 job in the release environment that checks out the code, sets up Python 3.10, verifies the source code and git tag version numbers match, installs build requirements, builds the package, publishes it to PyPI using a secret PyPI API token, and creates or updates a GitHub release with changelog link.
